title: Xero partners with Anthropic to bring Claude AI into small business accounting
description: Xero is partnering with Anthropic to embed Claude AI into its accounting software, giving SMEs real-time financial insights and automation tools. The post Xero partners with Anthropic to bring Claude AI into small business accounting appeared first on SmartCompany .

title: US judge suspends govt sanctions on AI company Anthropic
description: A US federal judge on Thursday suspended sanctions imposed by President Donald Trump’s administration on Anthropic, saying the measures likely violated the law in blacklisting the AI powerhouse for expressing unease about the Pentagon’s use of its technology. In the northern district of California, Judge Rita Lin granted Anthropic’s request for a preliminary injunction in [...] The post US judge suspends govt sanctions on AI company Anthropic appeared first on Digital Journal .

title: Federal judge temporarily blocks Pentagon from branding AI firm Anthropic a supply chain risk
description: SAN FRANCISCO — A federal judge has ruled in favor of artificial intelligence company Anthropic in temporarily blocking the Pentagon from labeling the company as a supply chain risk.

title: US judge suspends govt sanctions on AI company Anthropic
description: A US federal judge on Thursday suspended sanctions imposed by President Donald Trump's administration on Anthropic, saying the measures likely violated the law in blacklisting the AI powerhouse for expressing unease about the Pentagon's use of its technology.
